result:
All 30 tests pass. Here's what was added to `minigit.py`:

- **`parse_commit`** — shared helper to read/parse a commit file into a dict
- **`cmd_status`** — prints staged files or `(none)`
- **`cmd_diff`** — compares two commits' file lists, reporting Added/Removed/Modified
- **`cmd_checkout`** — restores working directory files from a commit, updates HEAD, clears index
- **`cmd_reset`** — moves HEAD to a commit without touching working directory files
- **`cmd_rm`** — removes a filename from the staging index
- **`cmd_show`** — displays commit metadata and files with two-space indent
